title: penstemon papillatus
intro: Penstemon papillatus, also known as the hairy beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Penstemon papillatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
